0.text: Bilateral multilobar lower lobes with patchy ground glass opacities

1.text: Interspersed areas of consolidation in bilateral multilobar lower lobes

2.text: Interlobular septal thickening in bilateral multilobar lower lobes

3.text: Diffuse lower lobar fibrosis in both lungs

4.text: Atelectasis in lower lobes of both lungs
